home.title: Lucas SALI--ORLIANGE
home.subtitle: Data Scientist | AI/ML Engineer
home.intro_text: I am a passionate developer who specializes in applying Artificial Intelligence to financial business problems. My approach is collaborative, I work directly with business operators to improve existing processes and increase profitability. All my solutions are built to be robust, scalable, and efficient, focusing on clean code and rapid delivery.

riif.title: RIIF
riif.description: A confidential, AI-driven Q&A solution that significantly accelerates preparation for financial reporting and executive briefings to answer investor questions.

tptrm.title: TPTRM
tptrm.description: Developed a tool for automated contract analysis, significantly reducing review time and human error through user-centric design.

accidentology.title: Accidentology
accidentology.description: Predicting accident severity from over 1 million road accidents to provide actionable insights into traffic safety using supervised learning.

research.title: Research
research.description: Interdisciplinary research on eco-concrete, leveraging predictive models to optimize formulations and reduce environmental impact.

facial_recognition.title: Facial Recognition
facial_recognition.description: Developed a facial recognition model using a custom dataset from "Jurassic Park" to demonstrate the end-to-end process of dataset creation and model training.

ai_and_data_science.category_description: Expertise in applying data-driven solutions to business problems.

programming_and_tools.category_description: A robust technical foundation for building scalable solutions.

professional_skills.category_description: My ability to communicate and collaborate effectively in a team.

contact_section.title: Get in Touch
contact_section.contact_text: Feel free to connect with me to discuss potential opportunities or collaborations.

paragraphs.p1: I'm a passionate Graduate Engineer specializing in Data Science and AI, with a proven track record of developing innovative, data-driven solutions for complex business problems. From automating financial reporting at BNP Paribas to building predictive models for sustainable engineering, my experience is defined by a commitment to creating efficient, robust, and impactful technical solutions.
paragraphs.p2: My academic journey, combined with practical internships, has equipped me with a strong foundation in AI/ML project lifecycles, from data preparation and model training to deployment and stakeholder communication. I thrive in collaborative environments and am eager to apply my skills to drive profitability and operational efficiency.

graduate_engineer.title: Graduate Engineer - Data Science & AI
graduate_engineer.description: Completed a Master’s Level Engineering degree with a specialization in Data Science and AI, focusing on Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Generative AI, MLOps, and Data Visualization. Ranked in the top 5% of my promotion and graduated as Technical Valedictorian.

internship_bnp.title: Internship - Data Scientist/ML Engineer
internship_bnp.description: Developed AI tools (RAG, NLP) to automate financial analysis and contract assessment. Focused on enhancing productivity and ensuring data integrity for financial reporting teams.

internship_research.title: Internship - Data Science Researcher
internship_research.description: Conducted R&D on predicting properties of eco-concrete using supervised ML models. Authored a comprehensive report in English, demonstrating expertise in scientific research and technical communication.

erasmus.title: Erasmus Semester - Engineering Sciences
erasmus.description: Completed a multidisciplinary program in Engineering Sciences at the Università di Bologna, gaining international exposure and a broader perspective on engineering principles.

it_technician.title: IT Technician
it_technician.description: Provided technical IT support to over 700 people, developing strong problem-solving and communication skills in a professional corporate environment.
